description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a modern, boxy design and a prominent hip roof covered in dark shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, likely stucco or painted concrete, with a stone or brick base trim running along the bottom. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on all sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house features a covered porch or balcony area with metal railings, adding both functionality and visual interest to the facade. The main entryway is recessed and sheltered by an overhanging roof, with steps leading up to the door. The overall appearance is clean, contemporary, and well-suited for an urban or suburban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a hip roof, light exterior walls, large windows, and a covered porch with metal railings.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with two large windows and a covered porch area with metal railings.
description_view_1: This view highlights the main entryway, which is recessed and accessed by steps, as well as a mix of window sizes and a partial view of the porch.
description_view_2: This side features a pair of large windows and a smaller covered entry or utility area, with the stone base trim clearly visible.
description_view_3: This view presents the front facade with a prominent covered porch, multiple large windows, and the main entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with steps, covered by an overhanging roof and adjacent to a porch with metal railings.
